={{ JSON.stringify({ user_id: $json.user_id, recurrence_key: $json.key, provider: $json.contract.provider || $json.merchant_or_label, name: $json.contract.name || $json.merchant_or_label, contract_type: $json.contract.contract_type || 'other', payment_frequency: $json.contract.payment_frequency || $json.period, monthly_cost: $json.contract.monthly_cost, yearly_cost: $json.contract.yearly_cost, source_transaction_ids: $json.transaction_ids, status: 'to_review' }) }}

nodes.name: Créer ou mettre à jour les contrats

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ user_id: $json.user_id, recurrence_key: $json.key, merchant_or_label: $json.merchant_or_label, period: $json.period, alerts: $json.alerts, transaction_ids: $json.transaction_ids, notify: true }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
console.error(JSON.stringify({ workflow: 'Life Pilot - Subscription monitor', step: $json.error?.node?.name || 'recurrence-analysis', message: $json.error?.message || $json.message || 'Erreur analyse inconnue', at: new Date().toISOString() }));
return items;

console.log(JSON.stringify({ workflow: 'Life Pilot - Subscription monitor', recurrence_key: $json.recurrence_key || $('Normaliser récurrences').item.json.key, status: $json.error ? 'error' : 'ok', message: $json.error?.message, at: new Date().toISOString() }));
return items;
